name: Neto Webstore

Click on the "}, {"text": "Install", "bold": true}, {"text": " button. The Neto module is a sales channel and may incur an additional cost."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "This will appear on your invoice as "}, {"text": "Neto A-6", "bold": true}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits-features"}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "A store that never closes"}], "data-id": "a-store-that-never-closes"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Operate 24/7 with Neto’s cloud-based eCommerce solution. Manage all your sales channels from one platform, wherever you are."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Build a beautiful online store", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Choose from over 70 free, editable, and fully-responsive web store themes designed by some of Australia’s best web designers."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Maintain complete control", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	You have full access to the HTML, CSS, and JS of your store, making it easy to customise every aspect of your website and shopping cart."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Enjoy flexible navigation", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Add products to an unlimited number of product categories. Allow customers to filter results by pre-defined specifics (eg. size or colour)."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Showcase your products", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Your products are displayed in an online catalogue that you can organise by category, specific, or variant."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Keep stock in multiple locations", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Keep track of your inventory across multiple warehouses/locations. Display real-time stock availability per location to your customers."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sell anything", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Neto does not limit the number or type of products you can have in your catalogue. If you can ship it, you can sell it with Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Secure checkout", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	All account pages, including your checkout and payment pages, are secured by 256-bit secure socket layer technology."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Seamless one-page checkout", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	You can expect lower cart abandonment rates with our one-page Ajax checkout. Quick, easy, and secure."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Upsell at cart", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Increase your average order value with cart upsells. Provide product recommendations based on a customer’s cart contents."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "Run your business from anywhere"}], "data-id": "run-your-business-from-anywhere"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "With Neto’s cloud-based platform, you can keep track of exactly what is happening across all your locations from a central dashboard."}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inbuilt order management", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Manage sales orders across multiple sales channels and locations from a central control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inbuilt pick, pack, and dispatch", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Pick, pack, and print shipping labels directly from orders in Neto. No need to use clunky third-party shipping apps."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Inbuilt inventory management", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Manage your purchase orders, stocktakes, and adjustments for multiple locations from a central control panel."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Google Analytics", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Track your website traffic, transactions, and conversion rates in real time with the world’s leading analytics platform."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Over 40 inbuilt reports", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Run order, payment, customer, inventory, and other reports in real time. Export all reports to Excel for further analysis."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Real-time dashboards", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Track the progress of your business in real time with your own customisable dashboard. Drag and drop widgets to make it your own."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Direct integrations", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Extend Neto with direct integrations to popular accounting, inventory, and marketing apps."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Powerful API", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	The Neto application programmer interface (API) enables third-party software to interact with Neto."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Over 100 add-ons", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Turn on hundreds of advanced features such as loyalty and customer groups from within the add-on store."}]}]}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "A feature-rich eCommerce platform"}], "data-id": "a-feature-rich-ecommerce-platform"}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Product variations", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	If you sell products with varying buying options such as colour and size, we have you covered! Each variation can have its own SKU, name, price, image, stock, and description."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Secure shopping cart", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	All account pages including your checkout pages are secured by 256-bit secure socket layer (SSL) technology."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Sync with accounting", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Direct two-way integrations with popular accounting programs such as Xero, MYOB, and Saasu."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Invoice and email notifications", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Automated receipt, invoice, and shipping tracking emails and PDF documents. Customise the look and layout of all systems-generated emails and documents."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Promotions and discount coupons", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Configure discount coupons and promotions. Trigger discounts automatically based on a pre-defined set of rules."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reward loyal customers", "bold": true}, {"text": "
"}, {"text": "	Reward your loyal customers with a loyalty points program. Customers earn points for purchases that can be redeemed as credit towards future purchases."}]}]}]}]
